name: TP53 300kb IMR-90 tissue-matched (ENCODE H3K27ac + CTCF)
description: 300kb window spanning the TP53 TAD on chr17p13.1. IMR-90 fetal lung fibroblast as tissue-matched context (TP53 is ubiquitously expressed, IMR-90 has intact p53 pathway). H3K27ac from ENCODE IMR-90 (ENCFF805GNH, ENCSR002YRE, Bing Ren UCSD). CTCF from ENCODE IMR-90 (ENCFF670ULH, ENCSR000EFI, Snyder Stanford). KEY FINDING: IMR-90 has 41 H3K27ac peaks in window vs K562 9 — dramatically richer enhancer landscape. 4 novel peaks (SHBG, 3× DNAH2) absent in K562. All K562 peaks preserved. 15 CTCF sites (vs K562 13), 2 novel.

enhancers.name: SHBG_TNFSF13_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Strongest H3K27ac in window: chr17:7626919-7627813 (signal=18.83, -log10q=130.0). At SHBG/TNFSF13 region. NOT present in K562. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy=0.9

enhancers.name: DNAH2_H3K27ac_1
enhancers.note: Strong H3K27ac: chr17:7747859-7748817 (signal=18.56, -log10q=65.0). In DNAH2 gene body. NOT present in K562. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy=0.9

enhancers.name: KDM6B_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Strong H3K27ac: chr17:7842331-7844028 (signal=17.75, -log10q=142.4). At KDM6B. Co-localizes with K562 peak (signal=45.47)

enhancers.name: EIF4A1_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Strong H3K27ac: chr17:7572834-7573770 (signal=16.35, -log10q=120.3). At EIF4A1 promoter. Co-localizes with K562 (signal=38.63)

enhancers.name: TP53_WRAP53_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Strong H3K27ac: chr17:7686179-7687845 (signal=16.12, -log10q=135.4). TP53/WRAP53 bidirectional promoter. Co-localizes with K562 (signal=70.08)

enhancers.name: DNAH2_H3K27ac_2
enhancers.note: H3K27ac: chr17:7749851-7750586 (signal=15.06, -log10q=43.4). DNAH2 region. NOT in K562

enhancers.name: DNAH2_H3K27ac_3
enhancers.note: H3K27ac: chr17:7751122-7751414 (signal=14.49, -log10q=37.0). DNAH2 region. NOT in K562

enhancers.name: MPDU1_SOX15_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: H3K27ac: chr17:7582928-7584718 (signal=13.83, -log10q=184.6). MPDU1/SOX15 cluster. Co-localizes with K562 (signal=85.29)

enhancers.name: KDM6B_upstream_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: H3K27ac: chr17:7835798-7837641 (signal=11.88, -log10q=105.4). KDM6B upstream. Near K562 peaks

enhancers.name: TP53_upstream_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: H3K27ac: chr17:7685633-7686071 (signal=11.19, -log10q=74.9). Just upstream of TP53 TSS

enhancers.name: EIF4A1_upstream_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: H3K27ac: chr17:7571970-7572470 (signal=10.68, -log10q=96.6). Upstream of EIF4A1. Near K562 peak

enhancers.name: SENP3_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: H3K27ac: chr17:7561234-7561784 (signal=10.36, -log10q=47.5). At SENP3 region, near TAD boundary

ctcf_sites.name: TP53_WRAP53_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strongest CTCF: chr17:7688066-7688339 (signal=416.42). Co-localizes with K562 (132.79). 3.1× stronger in IMR-90

ctcf_sites.name: DNAH2_internal_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF: chr17:7743620-7743882 (signal=411.87). Co-localizes with K562 (111.26). 3.7× stronger

ctcf_sites.name: SENP3_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF: chr17:7561025-7561265 (signal=304.08). Co-localizes with K562 (131.0). 2.3× stronger

ctcf_sites.name: SHBG_FXR2_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF: chr17:7614909-7615137 (signal=261.91). Co-localizes with K562 (89.55). 2.9× stronger

ctcf_sites.name: DNAH2_3prime_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF: chr17:7822779-7822996 (signal=247.51). Co-localizes with K562 (69.92). 3.5× stronger

ctcf_sites.name: SOX15_FXR2_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF: chr17:7589366-7589572 (signal=221.57). Near K562 SOX15_FXR2 (7586899, signal=108.84) but ~2.5kb away

ctcf_sites.name: KDM6B_upstream_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF: chr17:7834905-7835115 (signal=220.94). Co-localizes with K562 (114.77). 1.9× stronger

ctcf_sites.name: SHBG_downstream_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF: chr17:7634441-7634629 (signal=171.17). Co-localizes with K562 (97.61)

ctcf_sites.name: SHBG_internal_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF: chr17:7632543-7632720 (signal=156.52). Co-localizes with K562 (76.85)

ctcf_sites.name: DNAH2_mid_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF: chr17:7782371-7782531 (signal=155.83). NOT in K562 — novel IMR-90 CTCF site in DNAH2 gene body

ctcf_sites.name: DNAH2_promoter_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF: chr17:7717323-7717492 (signal=126.27). Co-localizes with K562 (71.85)

ctcf_sites.name: SENP3_CTCF_2
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF: chr17:7560494-7560641 (signal=116.21). Co-localizes with K562 (106.36)

ctcf_sites.name: TP53_intron_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF: chr17:7673311-7673555 (signal=59.38). Co-localizes with K562 (37.40)

ctcf_sites.name: KDM6B_adjacent_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF: chr17:7841599-7841843 (signal=52.15). NOT in K562 — novel IMR-90 CTCF near KDM6B

ctcf_sites.name: SOX15_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Weak CTCF: chr17:7587432-7587676 (signal=38.44). Near K562 SOX15_FXR2 insulator region

tissue_match_comparison.tissue_matched: IMR-90 fetal lung fibroblast (ENCFF805GNH H3K27ac, ENCFF670ULH CTCF)

enhancer_divergence.summary: IMR-90 has 12 enhancers vs K562 9. 4 novel peaks (SHBG, 3× DNAH2). All major K562 peaks preserved but with different signals. IMR-90 has richer enhancer landscape consistent with ubiquitous TP53 expression.

ctcf_divergence.summary: 15 vs 13 CTCF sites. All K562 sites preserved (most 2-4× stronger). 2 novel IMR-90 sites.

tissue_match_comparison.hypothesis: More enhancers + stronger CTCF → could show positive amplification despite TP53 being ubiquitously expressed. Or null if K562 already captures sufficient TP53 regulatory landscape.
